Metadata.title: MotoVault — AI Motorcycle Diagnostics & Learning App
Metadata.description: Master motorcycle maintenance, diagnose issues with AI photos, and track your bike's health. Free on iOS & Android.
Metadata.ogDescription: Master motorcycle maintenance, diagnose issues with AI photos, and track your bike's health. Free on iOS & Android.

Hero.subtitle: AI-powered motorcycle diagnostics & learning — launching soon.

Features.sectionSubtitle: Everything you need to learn, maintain, and master your motorcycle.

diag.title: AI Diagnostics
diag.description: Point your camera at any part, warning light, or issue. Our AI identifies components, diagnoses problems, and suggests fixes — all in seconds.

learn.title: Learning Paths
learn.tagline: Structured courses for every skill level.
learn.description: Dive into Engine Internals, Suspension Tuning, Electrical Systems, and Routine Maintenance — each with lessons, quizzes, and hands-on challenges.

garage.title: Garage Management
garage.description: Store every bike by make, model, and year. Log maintenance, set service reminders, and keep a complete history so nothing gets missed.

progress.title: Progress Tracking
progress.description: Level up as you complete lessons and ace quizzes. Earn badges, track scores across modules, and watch your expertise grow over time.

community.title: Community
community.description: Share your garage, compare progress, and learn alongside riders at every level. Motorcycle knowledge is better together.

HowItWorks.sectionSubtitle: Three simple steps to motorcycle mastery.
HowItWorks.step1Desc: Search by make, model, and year. Your bike's specs are loaded automatically from official databases.
HowItWorks.step2Desc: Snap a photo of any part or issue. Our AI identifies components, diagnoses problems, and suggests fixes.
HowItWorks.step3Desc: Follow personalized maintenance schedules and structured learning paths to master your motorcycle.

items.name: Alex R.
items.quote: MotoVault diagnosed a chain tension issue I'd been ignoring. Saved me from a breakdown on a long ride.

items.name: Maria G.
items.quote: The learning paths are perfect for someone who's new to wrenching. I changed my own brake pads thanks to MotoVault.

items.name: Jake T.
items.quote: Having all my maintenance history in one place is a game changer. No more guessing when the last oil change was.

items.name: Sarah K.

items.name: Tom W.
items.quote: Finally an app that treats motorcycle maintenance seriously. The garage feature alone is worth it.

items.question: What is MotoVault?
items.answer: MotoVault is an AI-powered platform designed for motorcycle enthusiasts. It helps you learn maintenance, diagnose issues using photo-based AI analysis, track your bikes in a digital garage, and build your knowledge through structured courses and quizzes.

items.question: Is MotoVault free?
items.answer: Yes! MotoVault offers a free tier that includes basic learning content, one bike in your garage, and limited AI diagnostics. For unlimited diagnostics, all learning content, and unlimited bikes, you can upgrade to MotoVault Pro within the app.

items.question: What motorcycles are supported?
items.answer: MotoVault supports all motorcycle makes and models. Our database uses the official NHTSA vehicle data, covering thousands of makes and models across all years. Simply search for your bike when adding it to your garage.

items.question: How does AI diagnostics work?
items.answer: Take a photo of any part of your motorcycle and describe the issue. Our AI analyzes the image and provides a diagnostic assessment with severity ratings — from critical issues that need immediate attention to minor maintenance suggestions.

items.question: Is my data safe?
items.answer: Your data is protected with enterprise-grade encryption and strict access controls. Authentication tokens are stored using platform-native secure storage, and all communication is encrypted in transit. We never share your personal information or bike data with third parties.

items.question: What's included in MotoVault Pro?
items.answer: MotoVault Pro unlocks unlimited AI diagnostics, access to all learning modules and courses, unlimited bikes in your garage, priority support, and exclusive content. You can subscribe monthly or yearly from within the app.

Footer.tagline: Learn your bike. Fix your bike.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.infoCollect: MotoVault collects the following types of information: (1) Authentication Data — email address and name through Supabase Auth (Google, Apple, or email sign-in); (2) Motorcycle Data — make, model, year, maintenance history, and service records you add to your garage; (3) Diagnostic Images — photos you upload for AI analysis; these are processed in real-time and deleted after analysis; (4) Usage Analytics — app interactions and feature usage tracked via PostHog to improve services; (5) Crash Reports — technical error data collected by Sentry to diagnose and fix issues; (6) Device Information — basic device identifiers for authentication and app functionality.
Privacy.howWeUse: Your information is used to: (1) Provide core services — account management, garage functionality, AI diagnostics, and learning modules; (2) Improve products — analyze usage patterns to enhance features and user experience; (3) Prevent fraud and security threats — detect unauthorized access and suspicious activity; (4) Comply with legal obligations — respond to lawful requests and enforce our terms; (5) Send service updates — notifications about account changes, new features, and important policy updates. We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties for marketing purposes.
Privacy.thirdParty: MotoVault relies on the following trusted services: (1) Supabase — authentication, database, and user management with enterprise encryption; (2) Anthropic Claude AI — processes diagnostic images and generates analysis (images are not retained); (3) Sentry — monitors application errors and crashes to improve stability; (4) PostHog — tracks feature usage and engagement to optimize the user experience; (5) NHTSA — provides motorcycle make/model/year data (no personal data shared). Each service provider maintains strict data protection practices and complies with applicable privacy laws.
Privacy.dataRetention: We retain your data only as long as necessary: (1) Account data — retained while your account is active and for 90 days after deletion; (2) Diagnostic images — processed and deleted within hours of upload; we do not store images permanently; (3) Usage analytics — retained for 6 months to identify trends; (4) Crash reports — retained for 30 days to diagnose and fix issues; (5) Backup copies — maintained for 30 days for disaster recovery. You can request permanent deletion of your account and associated data at any time.
Privacy.security: MotoVault implements enterprise-grade security measures: (1) Encryption in transit — all data transmitted over HTTPS/TLS; (2) Encryption at rest — sensitive data encrypted in databases; (3) Authentication — secure JWT tokens validated locally without network exposure; (4) Secure storage — authentication tokens stored in platform-native secure storage on mobile, never in AsyncStorage; (5) Access controls — strict role-based access policies for staff; (6) Regular audits — security practices regularly reviewed and updated. While we employ strong protections, no system is 100% secure; we maintain appropriate insurance and incident response procedures.
Privacy.yourRights: Under GDPR (EU residents) and CCPA (California residents), you have the following rights: (1) Right to Access — request a copy of your personal data; (2) Right to Rectification — correct inaccurate information; (3) Right to Erasure — request deletion of your data (right to be forgotten); (4) Right to Restrict Processing — limit how your data is used; (5) Right to Data Portability — receive your data in a structured, portable format; (6) Right to Object — opt out of certain processing, including marketing and analytics; (7) Right to Withdraw Consent — revoke any prior consent for specific data uses. California residents also have the right to know whether their data is sold and to request deletion of data collected. To exercise any of these rights, contact privacy@motovault.app with specific details of your request and verification of identity.
Privacy.childrenPrivacy: MotoVault is not intended for users under 13 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If we learn that we have collected such information, we will delete it immediately and take steps to prevent further collection. Parents or guardians who believe we have collected data from a child should contact us immediately at privacy@motovault.app.
Privacy.internationalTransfers: MotoVault operates globally. Your data may be transferred to, stored in, and processed in countries other than your country of residence, including the United States. These countries may not provide the same level of data protection as your home country. By using MotoVault, you consent to the transfer of your information to countries outside your country of residence for the purposes described in this policy. We implement standard contractual clauses and other mechanisms to ensure adequate protection for international data transfers.
Privacy.accountDeletion: You can delete your account and request permanent removal of your personal data at any time. To do so: (1) Log into your MotoVault account; (2) Navigate to Settings > Privacy & Data; (3) Select 'Delete My Account'; (4) Confirm the deletion (this action is irreversible). Your email, personal information, and garage data will be permanently deleted from our systems within 90 days. Some data may be retained longer if required by law or in anonymized/aggregated form for analytics.
Privacy.changes: MotoVault may update this Privacy Policy to reflect new features, services, or legal requirements. We will notify you of material changes by email or by displaying a prominent notice on our website. Your continued use of MotoVault after changes become effective constitutes acceptance of the updated policy. We encourage you to review this policy periodically to stay informed about how we protect your information.
Privacy.contact: For questions, concerns, or requests related to your privacy, data access, or to exercise your rights under GDPR/CCPA, please contact: MotoVault Privacy Team, Email: privacy@motovault.app. We will respond to valid requests within 30 days as required by applicable law. If you are a resident of the EU or California and believe we have violated your privacy rights, you also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority or the California Attorney General.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.acceptance: By accessing or using MotoVault, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable laws and regulations. If you do not agree to abide by any of these terms, you are prohibited from using or accessing this service.
Terms.serviceDescription: MotoVault is an AI-powered motorcycle learning and diagnostics platform designed for motorcycle enthusiasts. The service includes educational content, structured learning paths, AI-assisted photo diagnostics, garage management tools, progress tracking, and community features. MotoVault Pro is available as a subscription service with monthly and yearly billing options.
Terms.accounts: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and are responsible for all activities that occur under your account. You agree to provide accurate, complete, and current information when creating your account and to update your information as necessary. You must immediately notify us of any unauthorized use of your account or any other breach of security.
Terms.subscriptions: MotoVault Pro subscriptions are available through in-app purchases on iOS and Android. All subscriptions are subject to auto-renewal unless cancelled before the end of the current billing period. You understand that cancellation must be completed through the App Store (Apple) or Google Play (Android), not through the app itself. Pricing, billing cycles, and renewal terms are displayed in the app before purchase. Refunds are subject to the policies of the respective app store. By purchasing a subscription, you authorize the app store to charge your payment method on a recurring basis.
Terms.aiDisclaimer: MotoVault uses artificial intelligence (Claude by Anthropic) to generate educational content, diagnostic assessments, and learning materials. All AI-generated content is provided for educational and informational purposes only and does not constitute professional mechanical, technical, or engineering advice. AI diagnostic results include a confidence score indicating the model's certainty — results should be interpreted in the context of this score. MotoVault does not guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of AI-generated content or diagnostic assessments. You should always consult a qualified motorcycle mechanic before performing any repairs, for safety-critical issues, and to verify any AI-generated guidance. By using MotoVault's AI features, you acknowledge and accept these limitations.
Terms.ip: All content, features, graphics, designs, and functionality of MotoVault are owned by MotoVault or its content suppliers and are protected by copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws. Learning content, courses, quizzes, and educational materials may not be reproduced, distributed, or transmitted in any form without prior written permission from MotoVault.
Terms.userContent: When you upload photos or other content to MotoVault for diagnostic purposes, you grant MotoVault a non-exclusive license to use, process, and analyze that content to provide the service. Uploaded photos are processed for AI analysis and are not permanently stored without your consent. You are responsible for ensuring that you own or have the right to use any content you upload, and that your uploads do not violate any third-party rights, laws, or regulations.
Terms.prohibitedUses: You agree not to use MotoVault for any unlawful purpose or in any way that violates these Terms of Service. Prohibited uses include: reverse engineering, attempting to gain unauthorized access, using the service for any commercial purpose without our permission, uploading malware or harmful content, harassing or abusing other users, impersonating another person, or violating any applicable laws or regulations.
Terms.termination: MotoVault reserves the right to suspend or terminate your account and access to the service at any time, with or without cause, and with or without notice, if we believe you have violated these Terms of Service, engaged in prohibited conduct, or for any reason at our sole discretion. Upon termination, your right to use the service ceases immediately.
Terms.liability: MotoVault is provided "as is" and "as available" without warranties of any kind, either express or implied. MotoVault does not warrant that the service will be uninterrupted, error-free, or free of viruses or other harmful components. To the fullest extent permitted by law, MotoVault shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of or inability to use the service, even if MotoVault has been advised of the possibility of such damages.
Terms.indemnification: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless MotoVault and its officers, directors, employees, and agents from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses arising from your use of the service, your violation of these Terms of Service, or your infringement of any third-party rights. This includes claims related to your uploaded content or your reliance on AI-generated diagnostics.
Terms.governingLaw: These Terms of Service are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of the Slovak Republic (Slovakia), European Union, without regard to its conflict of law principles. You agree to submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts located in Slovakia for the resolution of any disputes arising from these Terms of Service or your use of MotoVault.
Terms.disputeResolution: Before initiating any legal action, you agree to attempt to resolve any dispute by contacting support@motovault.app with a written description of the issue. If the dispute cannot be resolved within thirty (30) days, either party may pursue legal remedies in accordance with the Governing Law section above.
Terms.modifications: MotoVault reserves the right to modify these Terms of Service at any time. Changes will be effective upon posting to the service, and your continued use of MotoVault following any modifications constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms. We will notify you of material changes via email or through the service.
Terms.contact: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at support@motovault.app. MotoVault is based in Slovakia, European Union.

Support.title: Help & Support
Support.subtitle: We're here to help you get the most out of MotoVault.
Support.contactDescription: Have a question or need help? Our support team is ready to assist you.
Support.faq1Question: How do I add a motorcycle to my garage?
Support.faq1Answer: Go to the Garage tab, tap the + button, and search for your motorcycle by make, model, and year. Your bike's specs are loaded automatically from official databases.
Support.faq2Answer: Take a photo of any part of your motorcycle or describe your symptoms. Our AI analyzes the image and provides a diagnostic assessment with severity ratings and recommended actions.
Support.faq3Answer: Yes! MotoVault offers a free tier with basic learning content, one bike in your garage, and limited AI diagnostics. Upgrade to MotoVault Pro for unlimited access to all features.
Support.faq4Question: How do I cancel my subscription?
Support.faq4Answer: MotoVault Pro subscriptions are managed through the App Store (iOS) or Google Play (Android). Go to your device's subscription settings to cancel or manage your plan.
Support.faq5Answer: Yes. You can delete your account from Settings > Privacy & Data > Delete My Account within the app, or visit our Account Deletion page for more details.
Support.faq6Answer: MotoVault supports all motorcycle makes and models using official NHTSA vehicle data, covering thousands of makes and models across all years.
Support.bugReportDescription: Found something that doesn't work right? Email us at support@motovault.app with a description of the issue, your device model, and app version. Screenshots are helpful!
Support.featureRequestDescription: Have an idea for MotoVault? We'd love to hear it! Send your suggestions to support@motovault.app and our team will review them.

AccountDeletion.title: Account Deletion
AccountDeletion.subtitle: Learn how to permanently delete your MotoVault account and data.
AccountDeletion.howToDeleteIntro: You can delete your MotoVault account directly from the app:
AccountDeletion.step1: Open MotoVault and go to your Profile tab.
AccountDeletion.step4: Confirm the deletion. This action is permanent and cannot be undone.
AccountDeletion.whatDeletedDescription: When you delete your account, the following data is permanently removed:
AccountDeletion.deletedItem1: Your email address and profile information
AccountDeletion.deletedItem2: All motorcycles in your garage and their maintenance history
AccountDeletion.deletedItem3: Your learning progress, quiz scores, and earned badges
AccountDeletion.deletedItem4: AI diagnostic history and uploaded photos
AccountDeletion.retentionDescription: Your data will be permanently deleted from our active systems within 30 days. Backup copies are removed within 90 days. Some data may be retained in anonymized, aggregated form for analytics, or as required by law.
AccountDeletion.alternativeDescription: If you cannot access the app, you can request account deletion by emailing privacy@motovault.app from the email address associated with your account. Include "Account Deletion Request" in the subject line. We will process your request within 30 days.
AccountDeletion.contactDescription: For any questions about account deletion or data privacy, contact us at

Blog.title: Motorcycle Maintenance Blog
Blog.description: Expert guides on motorcycle maintenance, AI diagnostics, and riding tips. Learn to maintain and diagnose your bike like a pro.

FeaturesDiagnostics.title: AI Motorcycle Diagnostics
FeaturesDiagnostics.description: Snap a photo of your motorcycle issue and get an AI-powered diagnosis in seconds. Supports 18,000+ bike models.
FeaturesDiagnostics.heroSubtitle: Point your camera at any part, warning light, or issue. Our AI identifies the problem and suggests fixes — all in seconds.
FeaturesDiagnostics.step1Desc: Take a photo of the motorcycle part, warning light, or issue you want diagnosed.
FeaturesDiagnostics.step2Desc: Our AI processes the image, identifies components, and cross-references known issues for your specific bike model.
FeaturesDiagnostics.step3Desc: Receive a detailed diagnosis with severity rating, recommended actions, and estimated repair costs.

FeaturesLearning.title: Motorcycle Learning Paths & Quizzes
FeaturesLearning.description: Master motorcycle maintenance with structured courses, interactive quizzes, and progress tracking. From basics to advanced.
FeaturesLearning.heroSubtitle: Structured courses, interactive quizzes, and hands-on challenges — from beginner to expert.
FeaturesLearning.course1Desc: Understand how your engine works, from combustion basics to valve timing and common failure points.
FeaturesLearning.course2Desc: Learn preload, rebound, and compression settings. Set up your suspension for your riding style.
FeaturesLearning.course3Desc: Master battery care, fuse diagnostics, starter troubleshooting, and wiring basics.
FeaturesLearning.course4Desc: Oil changes, chain care, brake inspection, tire pressure — everything for regular upkeep.
FeaturesLearning.quizDesc: Interactive quizzes after every lesson. Track your scores, earn badges, and build real expertise.

FeaturesGarage.title: Motorcycle Garage Management
FeaturesGarage.description: Track multiple bikes, log maintenance, set service reminders. Supports 18,000+ models via NHTSA database.
FeaturesGarage.heroSubtitle: Track every bike you own. Log maintenance, set reminders, and keep a complete service history.
FeaturesGarage.multiBikeDesc: Add unlimited motorcycles to your digital garage. Each bike gets its own maintenance timeline and service history.
FeaturesGarage.nhtsaDesc: Search by make, model, and year. Our database uses official NHTSA vehicle data covering every major manufacturer.
FeaturesGarage.historyDesc: Log every oil change, tire swap, and service visit. Never forget when you last maintained a critical component.
FeaturesGarage.remindersDesc: Set mileage-based or time-based reminders. Get notified before maintenance is overdue.

FeaturesProgress.title: Track Your Motorcycle Knowledge
FeaturesProgress.description: Earn badges, track quiz scores, build learning streaks. Gamified motorcycle education that keeps you motivated.
FeaturesProgress.heroSubtitle: Gamified learning that keeps you motivated. Earn badges, build streaks, and watch your expertise grow.
FeaturesProgress.badgesDesc: Complete courses, ace quizzes, and hit milestones to unlock achievement badges. Show off your motorcycle knowledge.
FeaturesProgress.streaksDesc: Learn something new every day. Build streaks to stay consistent and build lasting motorcycle knowledge.
FeaturesProgress.scoresDesc: See your performance across all modules. Identify weak areas and focus your learning where it matters most.
